name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Abuse of Print Executable
notes:
This Building Block detects the use of print.exe for remote file copy.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Furkan CALISKAN, @caliskanfurkan_, @oscd_initiative
SIGMA Title: Abusing Print Executable
SIGMA Description: Attackers can use print.exe for remote file copy


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Abuse of Print Executable on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of print.exe
when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE 'print%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/d%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.exe%') AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%print.exe%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Abuse of Print Executable on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of print.exe
AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE 'print%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/d%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.exe%') AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%print.exe%' AQL filter query
